name: Postiz
description: Full-coverage Postiz client for OpenClaw agents: integrations, posts (create / list / update / delete), uploads, analytics, and video. Env-gated writes, confirm-required deletes, built-in 30/hr rate-limit guard, bundled per-provider settings schemas.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Postiz instance, e.g. http://localhost:5000 or https://postiz.example.com.

apiKey.description: Postiz public API key. Leave blank and set POSTIZ_API_KEY (or your custom apiKeyEnv) in the environment instead.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable to read the API key from when apiKey is blank.

enableWrite.description: Enable create / update / upload / connect / generate-video tools. Off by default. Postiz writes are public side effects on real social accounts; this gate forces explicit opt-in. Does NOT enable delete tools.

enableDelete.description: Second gate for delete tools (delete-post, delete-post-group, delete-integration). Off by default. Required IN ADDITION to enableWrite. Each delete tool also requires `confirm: true` in the call args. delete-integration cascades and removes every scheduled post for the integration; delete-post cascades to the whole group.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for Postiz API calls.

rateLimitPerHour.description: Local rate-limit ceiling. Postiz public API defaults to 30/hr; raise this if your instance is configured higher. The client refuses to send when the local counter shows 0.

uploadRoots.description: Allowlist of directory roots that postiz_upload_file accepts filePath uploads from. Empty array (the default) disables filePath uploads entirely; agents must supply base64. POSTIZ_UPLOAD_ROOTS (comma- or colon-separated) overrides at runtime.

maxUploadBytes.description: Hard byte cap for any single upload (filePath or base64). Defended at the tool layer to prevent OOMing the MCP host. Default 100 MiB.

cfAccessClientId.description: Cloudflare Access service-token client id, when Postiz is behind a CF Access policy. Leave blank and use the env var (cfAccessClientIdEnv) for production deploys.

cfAccessClientSecret.description: Cloudflare Access service-token secret. Same handling as cfAccessClientId.

cfAccessClientIdEnv.description: Environment variable holding the CF Access client id when cfAccessClientId is blank.

cfAccessClientSecretEnv.description: Environment variable holding the CF Access client secret when cfAccessClientSecret is blank.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.help: Your Postiz instance (e.g. http://localhost:5000). Use the LAN-direct path when possible; CF Access tunnels add latency and consume the rate-limit budget either way.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Generate in Postiz under Settings → Public API. Prefer keyRef to an env var over an inline value.

enableWrite.label: Enable Write Tools
enableWrite.help: Exposes create-post, connect-integration, update-post-status, update-post-release-id, upload-file, upload-from-url, generate-video. PUBLIC SIDE EFFECT: with type='now' or near-term schedule, posts land on real social accounts.

enableDelete.label: Enable Delete Tools
enableDelete.help: Second gate for delete-post, delete-post-group, delete-integration. Off by default. Required IN ADDITION to enableWrite. Each delete also requires confirm:true in the call. Already-published platform posts cannot be recalled; only Postiz records are removed.

uploadRoots.label: Upload roots (filePath allowlist)
uploadRoots.help: Directory roots that postiz_upload_file accepts filePath uploads from. Leave empty to require base64 input.
